What to Do When You Get in a Traffic Accident? — Litigation and Settlement (4)

Going to court isn't something anyone wants to do, but sometimes it's the only way to resolve things. So in this post I'm going to walk through litigation and settlement — what your rights are, how the process works, and what to watch out for if you end up at this stage.
What to Do When You Get in a Traffic Accident? — Acceptance and Getting Help (3)

In the previous post we covered what you can do after the accident, and I specifically called out "self-care" at the end — because the moment your emotions might really crash is when the "preliminary report" comes out...
What to Do When You Get in a Traffic Accident? — Facing the Aftermath (2)
In the previous post, we covered what to do at the scene. This post covers things that happen after the accident — things you might not have thought about, but are really important.
What to Do When You Get in a Traffic Accident? — On-Scene Handling (1)
Nobody wants a traffic accident — beyond property damage, people get hurt. We'd all rather avoid it, but life doesn't always cooperate. So this post is meant to help if you ever find yourself in one.
